items.title: Unchild debuts with bold, rule-breaking identity in ‘We Are Unchild’
items.snippet: Rookie girl group Unchild stepped into the K-pop scene with a confident message of individuality, unveiling its debut digital single “We Are Unchild” at a media showcase Tuesday in...
items.description: Rookie girl group Unchild stepped into the K-pop scene with a confident message of individuality, unveiling its debut digital single “We Are Unchild” at a media showcase Tuesday in central Seoul. The showcase marked the official debut of the six-member act — Heekie, Tina, Haeun, Yeeun, Ako and Evon — who introduced themselves as a team determined to break away from conventions. The group’s name reflects that ambition. By adopting the prefix “un-,” Unchild positions itself as a collective that re

items.title: Cortis gets bolder with 'RedRed'
items.snippet: Cortis returned Monday with prerelease track “RedRed,” showcasing a bolder, more self-defined musical identity ahead of its upcoming second EP. Dubbed a “young creator crew,” the B...
items.description: Cortis returned Monday with prerelease track “RedRed,” showcasing a bolder, more self-defined musical identity ahead of its upcoming second EP. Dubbed a “young creator crew,” the BigHit Music act has distinguished itself by taking part in all aspects of production — from songwriting and choreography to video direction — setting it apart from typical rookie groups. The boy group debuted last year as a junior act following BTS and Tomorrow X Together. It quickly drew attention with its debut album

items.title: BTS stays among top 10 on Billboard’s Hot 100
items.snippet: BTS is spending its fourth week on Billboard’s Hot 100 at No. 10 with “Swim,” according to the chart preview published Tuesday. The main track from the group's fifth studio album “...
items.description: BTS is spending its fourth week on Billboard’s Hot 100 at No. 10 with “Swim,” according to the chart preview published Tuesday. The main track from the group's fifth studio album “Arirang” fell five rungs from the previous week, after having made a chart-topping debut on the rankings. It was the band’s seventh song overall to occupy the top spot on the main songs chart and sixth to debut at the top. The single has charted four weeks at No. 1 on both the Billboard Global 200 and Billboard Global

items.title: Aespa to return with second LP ‘Lemonade’ on May 29
items.snippet: Aespa is set to return with its second full-length album, titled “Lemonade,” on May 29, SM Entertainment said Monday. The upcoming album will feature 10 tracks spanning various gen...
items.description: Aespa is set to return with its second full-length album, titled “Lemonade,” on May 29, SM Entertainment said Monday. The upcoming album will feature 10 tracks spanning various genres, offering a broader look at the group’s musical spectrum. Known for its distinctive universe-driven concept, Aespa is expected to further expand its storytelling while showcasing a more mature sound through the new release. Since its debut, Aespa has gained attention for its signature “metallic” identity, a unique

items.title: NCT Wish closes tour with youthful energy, opens door to next chapter
items.snippet: Dressed in all white and rising from the center of a star-shaped stage, NCT Wish opened the final night of its “Into the Wish: Our Wish” encore concert at Kspo Dome in southern Seo...
items.description: Dressed in all white and rising from the center of a star-shaped stage, NCT Wish opened the final night of its “Into the Wish: Our Wish” encore concert at Kspo Dome in southern Seoul on Sunday with the clean, bright visual that has come to define the group. Beyond the polished staging, the night carried a deeper meaning: the finale of a six-month tour and the threshold of a new era, coming just a day before the release of its first album, “Ode to Love.” While the show looked back on the journey

items.title: TXT logs 1.8m in first-week sales
items.snippet: Tomorrow X Together’s eighth EP “7th Year: A Moment of Stillness in the Thorns” sold more than 1.8 million units in its first week, said label Big Hit Music Monday, citing a local...
items.description: Tomorrow X Together’s eighth EP “7th Year: A Moment of Stillness in the Thorns” sold more than 1.8 million units in its first week, said label Big Hit Music Monday, citing a local tally. The mini album logged 1 million sales on the day of release, becoming its seventh consecutive album to do so. The six-track endeavor debuted at the top of Oricon’s Daily Album Ranking and reclaimed the top spot on Friday. The main track, “Stick With You,” hit Line Music’s Daily Songs Chart at No. 1 and spent two

items.title: BTS to take 'The City' project to Las Vegas and Busan
items.snippet: K-pop supergroup BTS' large-scale cultural program "The City" will return to Las Vegas next month and Busan in June to celebrate the group's stops there for the ongoing world tour,...
items.description: K-pop supergroup BTS' large-scale cultural program "The City" will return to Las Vegas next month and Busan in June to celebrate the group's stops there for the ongoing world tour, the group's agency, BigHit Music, said Monday. "The City" project debuted during the band's "Permission to Dance on Stage" tour in Las Vegas in 2022 to boost the festive mood, illuminating the city's major landmarks in purple, the signature color of its global fandom, ARMY. The project also features various BTS-themed

items.title: Seventeen garners 100m Spotify streams with ‘Thunder’
items.snippet: Seventeen's “Thunder” reached 100 million plays on Spotify on Saturday, agency Pledis Entertainment said Monday. It is the group’s 20th song to reach the 100 million mark, includin...
items.description: Seventeen's “Thunder” reached 100 million plays on Spotify on Saturday, agency Pledis Entertainment said Monday. It is the group’s 20th song to reach the 100 million mark, including singles from its subunits. The electronic dance tune is the lead single from fifth full album “Happy Burstday,” which was released in May 2025. items.title: BTS slips to No. 3 on Billboard 200 after 3-week reign
items.snippet: BTS' fifth studio album “Arirang” slid to No. 3 on Billboard 200, after staying atop the main albums chart for three weeks in a row, according to the chart preview published Monday...
items.description: BTS' fifth studio album “Arirang” slid to No. 3 on Billboard 200, after staying atop the main albums chart for three weeks in a row, according to the chart preview published Monday. The LP has dominated Spotify’s Weekly Top Albums Global for four consecutive weeks with the main track “Swim” on its Weekly Top Songs Global. items.title: BTS at Tokyo Dome
items.snippet: BTS wrapped up their “BTS World Tour ‘ARIRANG’ IN TOKYO” concerts at Tokyo Dome in Japan on April 17-18, its agency Big Hit Entertainment announced Sunday. The performances marked...
items.description: BTS wrapped up their “BTS World Tour ‘ARIRANG’ IN TOKYO” concerts at Tokyo Dome in Japan on April 17-18, its agency Big Hit Entertainment announced Sunday. The performances marked the group’s return to Tokyo Dome after seven years and five months, following their “BTS World Tour Love Yourself ~Japan Edition~” shows in November 2018. Both concerts sold out well in advance, drawing a total of 110,000 fans over the two days. After Tokyo, BTS heads to the United States, where the group will meet fan

items.title: NCT Wish to open new musical chapter with first LP ‘Ode to Love’
items.snippet: NCT Wish shared details of its upcoming first LP, “Ode to Love,” during a press conference held Sunday at KSPO Dome in southern Seoul, marking the final day of the boy group's thre...
items.description: NCT Wish shared details of its upcoming first LP, “Ode to Love,” during a press conference held Sunday at KSPO Dome in southern Seoul, marking the final day of the boy group's three-day series of encore concerts. The sextet — Sion, Riku, Yushi, Jaehee, Ryo and Sakuya — is set to release the 10-track album Monday, led by the title track of the same name. Built on a New UK garage-based dance-pop sound, “Ode to Love” carries a message of warmth and kindness in a “cold world,” while maintaining the

items.title: K-pop's fan driven promotions get more subtle, sophisticated
items.snippet: K-pop promotions are becoming increasingly interactive and concept-driven, as artists move beyond traditional teasers and social media challenges to create more campaigns that invi...
items.description: K-pop promotions are becoming increasingly interactive and concept-driven, as artists move beyond traditional teasers and social media challenges to create more campaigns that invite fan participation. Girl group Le Sserafim’s latest social media rollout for its upcoming single “Celebration” is one of the most recent examples of this shift. The quintet recently launched the “#TimeToCelebrate” campaign across its official channels, encouraging fans to share and celebrate everyday moments. Moving

items.title: Babymonster logs 400m views in record time with ‘Sheesh’ music video
items.snippet: Babymonster amassed 400 million hits on YouTube with the music video for “Sheesh,” label YG Entertainment announced Friday. The video was released in April 2024 accompanying the so...
items.description: Babymonster amassed 400 million hits on YouTube with the music video for “Sheesh,” label YG Entertainment announced Friday. The video was released in April 2024 accompanying the song that officially marked the group’s debut. It reached the milestone in the fastest time for a music video for a K-pop girl group’s debut single, passing 100, 200 and 300 million views on the platform. “Sheesh” achieved success on Billboard’s global charts, peaking at No. 33 on Global 200 and No. 16 on Global excl. items.snippet: Tomorrow X Together’s eighth EP “7th Year: A Moment of Stillness in the Thorns” is enjoying chart success at home and in Japan, according to label Big Hit Music. The mini album lan...
items.description: Tomorrow X Together’s eighth EP “7th Year: A Moment of Stillness in the Thorns” is enjoying chart success at home and in Japan, according to label Big Hit Music. The mini album landed atop Oricon’s Daily Album Ranking and ranked No. 2 on the following day. The six-track EP is also the group's seventh consecutive million-selling album, with more than 1.35 million copies sold on its release day. items.title: Katseye to roll out 3rd EP in August
items.snippet: Katseye is set to release its third EP “Wild” on Aug. 14, agency Hybe X Geffen Records announced Thursday. The mini album will follow over a year since the previous EP, “Beautiful...
items.description: Katseye is set to release its third EP “Wild” on Aug. 14, agency Hybe X Geffen Records announced Thursday. The mini album will follow over a year since the previous EP, “Beautiful Chaos.” The five-track set was a breakout hit, generating 1 billion streams on Spotify in less than five months and ranking among the top ten in the US in terms of CD sales in 2025. The second EP peaked at No. 4 on Billboard 200 logging 41 weeks on the chart; “Gabriela” and “Gnarly” charted 28 and 13 weeks on its Hot 1
